name: able-scrum-master-agents
description: AI Agents for end-to-end Scrum automation on Azure DevOps — configure via config.ini

chatParticipants.name: ScrumAgent
chatParticipants.description: Able Scrum Master Agent — type @ScrumAgent then Tab to see all commands

commands.name: BacklogRefinement
commands.description: Backlog Refinement — Prepare & clarify backlog items with Acceptance Criteria

commands.name: PokerPlanning
commands.description: Poker Planning — Estimate effort and suggest story points

commands.name: SprintPlanning
commands.description: Sprint Planning — Finalize sprint scope and generate SDLC child tasks per User Story

commands.name: DailyScrum
commands.description: Daily Scrum — Track progress, surface blockers and post standup summary

commands.name: Retrospective
commands.description: Retrospective — Analyse sprint velocity and draft improvement report

commands.name: ReleaseNotes
commands.description: Release Notes — Generate release notes from completed sprint stories and PRs
